version_description: Gorgeous tribute to Roy Orbison from J.D. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Chorus and interlude play as intro. Outro plays as refrain with ad-libs fading out over the last chords.

versions.version_description: Transposed for a baritone vocalist. View the entire song on one page whether viewing online or a printed page. Chord changes located relative to the vocals. Cheers.
Chords based on the Pro Tab.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Have You Ever Seen The Rain

content:
*RIP J.D.

As heard on the original single edit: https://youtu.be/quglprlSQ8k?si=YaS5_nBigWkcPU_h

*This song is recorded just over 23 cents sharp. Tune your guitar to A=446HZ to play along with the record.


Chord Voicings:

A: X02220
Asus2: X02200
F#m: 244222
F#7sus4: 242422
D: XX0232
Dsus2: XX0230
E7: 020100
E7sus4: 020200
Asus4: X02230
F#m7: 242222
Dsus4: XX0233



[Intro]
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]E7sus4[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]Asus4[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]
 When the world is ready to fall,    on your little shoulders[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Dsus4[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 And when you're feeling lonely and small[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus2[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Asus2[/ch]
 You need some - body there to hold you[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 You can call out my name[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]
 When you're only   lonely[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 Now don't you ever be a-shamed[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]      [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
 You're only   lonely[/tab]


[Interlude]
[ch]Asus2[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]E7sus4[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]F#7sus4[/ch] [ch]F#m7[/ch]
 When you need some-body a-round,    on the nights that try you, remember[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Dsus4[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Asus2[/ch]
 I was there when you were a queen,    and I'll be the last  one there be-side you[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 So you can call out my name[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]
 When you're only   lonely[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 Now don't you ever be a-shamed[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]      [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
 You're only   lonely[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Asus2[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]
(You're only lonely)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]F#7sus4[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]
(You're only    lonely)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
(You're only  lonely)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch] [ch]E7sus4[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
           Oooooooh[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]Asus4[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]
 When the world is ready to fall,    on your little shoulders[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Dsus4[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 And when you're feeling lonely and small[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus2[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Asus2[/ch]
 You need some - body there to hold you[/tab]


[Chorus 3]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]
 So don't you ever be a-shamed,      when you're only   lonely[/tab]
(Hold you,              hold you)
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Darling you can call out my name,      when you're only   lonely[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Asus2[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]F#7sus4[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]
(You're only lonely) When you're only lonely,                 oo it's no[/tab]
                                      (You're only    lonely)
[tab][ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]          [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]E7sus4[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch]    [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Crime,      darling we got lots of time        woah oooh   ohh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Asus2[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]
(You're only lonely) Woah oooh  ohh[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]F#7sus4[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
(You're only    lonely) Oh there's nothing wrong with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]        [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]E7sus4[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]E7sus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
 Darling I get lonely toooooooooooooooooooooo[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Asus2[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]
(You're only lonely)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]F#7sus4[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]E7[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
(You're only    lonely) So if you need me,    all you gotta do is call me[/tab]
                                 (You're only lonely)
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]          [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]
 Yea you're only   loooooooooooooooooooooooooooonely[/tab]
                        (You're only lonely)

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]F#7sus4[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]
(You're only    lonely)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
(You're only  lonely)[/tab]
[ch]E7[/ch] [ch]E7sus4[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
